validate.owner: `❌` You cannot moderate the server owner.
validate.higherRole: `❌` You cannot moderate someone with an equal or higher role.

setup.configMissing: `❌` Moderation module is not configured or disabled. Use `/module setup name:Moderation` first.

mute.roleMissing: `❌` Muted role is not configured. Run `/module setup name:Moderation` again.
mute.unmuteHigherRole: `❌` You cannot unmute someone with an equal or higher role.

ban.notBannable: `❌` I cannot ban this member. Check my role position.
ban.softbanSuccess: {{emoji}} **{{user}}** has been softbanned. Messages from the last **{{days}} days** were deleted.

kick.notKickable: `❌` I cannot kick this member. Check my role position.

history.specifyUser: `❌` Please specify a user or user ID.
history.noSanctions: `📋` No sanctions found for this user.
history.title: Sanction history for <@{{user}}>
